calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs' Responses, Without Objections, To Requests For Production (Set One) To Plaintiffs Patricia Duarte, Luis Gutierrez, Thomas Duarte, Nicole Gutierrez, And Genesis Gutierrez; Request For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,566.00 Against Plaintiffs And/Or Their Attorneys Of Record; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; And Declaration Of Lori Cataldo
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SABINA YUEN'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFFS' RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS, TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION (SET ONE) TO PLAINTIFFS PATRICIA DUARTE, LUIS GUTIERREZ, THOMAS DUARTE, NICOLE GUTIERREZ, AND GENESIS GUTIERREZ; REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,566.00 AGAINST PLAINTIFFS AND/OR THEIR ATTORNEYS OF RECORD

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to compel responses to requests for production is denied as moot. Plaintiffs provide proof that they electronically served the RFP responses by email on March 16, 2026, before Defendant filed this motion on April 6, 2026. Defendant shall pay $500 as a sanction to Plaintiff Patricia Duarte within 30 days of this order; moving for relief without disclosing to the court that responses had already been served (or, if the responses were overlooked before the motion was filed, failing to take the motion off calendar upon discovering the oversight) lacks substantial justification. (Code Civ. Proc., sec. 2031.300, subd. (c).) Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
